description_long: This is a round, woven wicker picnic basket with a single, sturdy arched handle attached at opposite sides of the rim. The basket features a tightly interlaced weave pattern, giving it both strength and a rustic, handcrafted appearance. The rim is reinforced with a thicker, braided band that adds structural integrity and visual interest. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for carrying food, drinks, or other personal items, and the basket does not have a lid. The coloration is a natural mix of light and dark brown tones, typical of untreated or lightly finished wicker. The handle is also woven and appears robust enough for comfortable carrying.
description: A round, woven wicker picnic basket with a single arched handle and a reinforced braided rim, finished in natural brown tones. The basket is open-topped and spacious, ideal for carrying items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular opening, braided rim, and the arched handle centered over the basket.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the depth of the basket, with the handle aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open top and the continuous weave pattern around the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle again prominent, showing the basket's depth and the woven texture.
attribute_handle_type: Single arched handle, fixed, woven from the same wicker material as the basket, attached at two opposite rim points.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with a decorative braided rim; consistent and dense throughout the body.
